title: keeper-security-posture.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-security-posture family (P15 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P15 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: compliance_assertions, security_audit_assertions, breachwatch_config, risk_benchmarks. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
